Technical Skills
Languages: JavaScript, C++, Python, SQL, HTML5, CSS3
Frontend: React.js, Next.js, Redux, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, Material-UI, Responsive Design
Backend: Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, JWT Authentication, Microservices Architecture
Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, FAISS Vector DB, Database Design, Query Optimization
AI/ML: RAG Systems, Vector Embeddings, OpenAI API, Google Gemini, Prompt Engineering
DevOps & Tools: Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Postman, Linux, Render, Vercel
Problem Solving: Data Structures & Algorithms (150+ LeetCode, 50+ GeeksforGeeks), Dynamic Programming
Projects
Spottr — AI-Powered Social Fitness PlatformGitHub— Live
MERN Stack, RAG, Socket.io, Docker, FAISSOct 2024 – Dec 2024
•
Architected full-stack social media platform for fitness enthusiasts featuring user profiles, social connections, activity
feeds, and AI-powered nutrition planning using RAG architecture with FAISS vector database and LangChain
•
Engineered geolocation-based social matching algorithm with weighted compatibility scoring to connect users with
workout partners based on proximity, fitness levels, and shared goals
•
Integrated real-time social messaging using Socket.io WebSockets enabling instant user communication with
MongoDB persistence
TruBalance — Financial Management & Invoicing SystemGitHub— Live
MERN Stack, JWT, Chart.js, REST APIsAug 2024 – Oct 2024
•
Built intelligent expense tracking platform with AI-powered insights engine analyzing spending patterns, detecting
anomalies, and generating personalized budget recommendations using statistical algorithms
•
Engineered rule-based AI system for smart transaction categorization across 15+ categories with pattern
recognition and financial health scoring
•
Designed systematized invoicing workflow with state management (Draft/Sent/Paid/Overdue), computerized GST
calculations, and JWT-secured RESTful APIs
•
Created interactive analytics dashboard with Chart.js displaying AI-generated insights, predictive forecasts, and
category-wise expense breakdowns
QuizMaster.AI — Real-Time AI Quiz PlatformGitHub
— Live
Node.js, Socket.io, OpenAI API, WebSocketsJun 2024 – Aug 2024
•
Created AI-powered quiz platform using GPT-4 API to dynamically generate quizzes from custom topics or
uploaded PDF documents with automated grading
•
Implemented real-time multiplayer architecture using Socket.io with live leaderboards, instant scoring, and
host-player session management
•
Developed anti-cheating system monitoring tab switches and window focus events, with automated result reports
and performance analytics
Certifications
Design and Analysis of Algorithms — NPTEL
Data Structures and Algorithms Using Java — NPTEL
Object Oriented Programming Using Java — GeeksforGeeks
Database Programming with SQL — Oracle Academy

Software Engineer - Job Description
Overview:
We are looking for a passionate Software Engineer to design, develop, and maintain scalable web
applications. The ideal candidate should have strong problem-solving skills and experience with
modern technologies.
Key Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain web applications
- Write clean, scalable code
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams
- Debug and optimize performance
- Participate in code reviews
Requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
- Proficiency in JavaScript, Node.js, React
- Understanding of databases (MongoDB/SQL)
- Familiarity with Git and version control
- Knowledge of REST APIs
Preferred Skills:
- Experience with Docker and cloud platforms
- Knowledge of DevOps practices
- Understanding of AI/ML concepts is a plus
Benefits:
- Competitive salary
- Flexible working hours
- Learning and development opportunities
- Collaborative work environment
